subject: An ornate art-deco showcase frame containing an abstract design of swirling, dark, smoke-like tendrils emanating from a central glowing point, suggesting psychic or mind-controlling influence
description: A showcase-treatment card with an elaborate gold filigree border framing the artwork. The art itself is sparse and symbolic: swirling tendrils of black smoke or shadow radiate outward from a central glowing focal point against a deep purple-black field. The composition feels occult and conspiratorial, suggesting unseen manipulation rather than depicting a literal figure. The ornate Karlov Manor showcase frame dominates much of the card with its golden art-nouveau scrollwork.
foreground: swirling black smoke tendrils radiating from a central glowing point
background: dark purple-black void with subtle radial gradient
